companies.description_zh: 美国第七大汽车保险公司，以直接销售模式和低成本运营著称
companies.description_en: The seventh largest auto insurer in the US, known for its direct sales model and low-cost operations
companies.key_quote_zh: 盖可保险凭借其卓越且不断提升的运营效率，比几乎任何其他大型保险公司都处于更安全的地位。
companies.key_quote_en: GEICO Corporation, our major non-controlled business operating in this field, is, by virtue of its extreme and improving operating efficiency, in a considerably more protected position than almost any other major insurer.

companies.description_zh: 美国大型食品公司，1981年伯克希尔的四大持股之一
companies.description_en: Major American food company, one of Berkshire's four major holdings in 1981
companies.key_quote_zh: 仅在这一类别中的四项持股——盖可保险、通用食品、雷诺烟草公司和华盛顿邮报——我们在1982年应占的未分配且未被记录的收益，很可能总计远超3,500万美元。
companies.key_quote_en: In just four ownership positions in this category - GEICO Corporation, General Foods Corporation, R. J. Reynolds Industries, Inc. and The Washington Post Company - our share of undistributed and therefore unrecorded earnings probably will total well over $35 million in 1982.

companies.description_zh: 美国主要新闻媒体公司，由格雷厄姆家族控制
companies.description_en: Major American media company controlled by the Graham family
companies.key_quote_zh: 盖可保险、通用食品、雷诺烟草公司和华盛顿邮报是伯克希尔四大重要非控制权持股。
companies.key_quote_en: GEICO Corporation, General Foods Corporation, R. J. Reynolds Industries, Inc. and The Washington Post Company were Berkshire's four major non-controlled holdings.

companies.description_zh: 美国大型烟草公司，1981年伯克希尔重要持股之一
companies.description_en: Major American tobacco company, one of Berkshire's significant holdings in 1981
companies.key_quote_zh: 雷诺烟草是伯克希尔四大非控制权持股之一，预计1982年贡献大量未分配收益。
companies.key_quote_en: R. J. Reynolds Industries was one of Berkshire's four major non-controlled holdings, expected to contribute significant undistributed earnings in 1982.

companies.description_zh: 伯克希尔持有约60%股权的子公司，旗下拥有韦斯科金融等企业
companies.description_en: Subsidiary in which Berkshire holds approximately 60%, with Wesco Financial and other businesses under its umbrella
companies.key_quote_zh: 伯克希尔拥有蓝筹印花约60%的股权，而蓝筹印花又拥有韦斯科金融公司80%的股权。
companies.key_quote_en: Berkshire owns about 60% of Blue Chip Stamps which, in turn, owns 80% of Wesco Financial Corporation.

companies.description_zh: 蓝筹印花持股80%的金融子公司，由路易斯·文森蒂管理
companies.description_en: Financial subsidiary 80% owned by Blue Chip Stamps, managed by Louis Vincenti
companies.key_quote_zh: 蓝筹印花和韦斯科都是上市公司，有各自的信息披露要求。
companies.key_quote_en: Blue Chip Stamps and Wesco are public companies with reporting requirements of their own.

companies.description_zh: 伯克希尔收购的优质糖果公司，由查克·哈金斯管理
companies.description_en: Premium candy company acquired by Berkshire, managed by Chuck Huggins
companies.key_quote_zh: 喜诗糖果是伯克希尔的重要控股企业，1981年贡献税后净收益628.9万美元。
companies.key_quote_en: See's Candies was an important controlled business of Berkshire, contributing $6.289 million in after-tax earnings in 1981.

companies.description_zh: 伯克希尔收购的布法罗地区报纸，1981年仍处于亏损状态
companies.description_en: Buffalo-area newspaper acquired by Berkshire, still operating at a loss in 1981
companies.key_quote_zh: 布法罗晚报1981年亏损27.6万美元。
companies.key_quote_en: Buffalo Evening News had a loss of $276,000 in 1981.

companies.description_zh: 伯克希尔的储蓄贷款子公司
companies.key_quote_zh: 互助储贷公司1981年贡献154万美元。
companies.key_quote_en: Mutual Savings and Loan contributed $1.536 million in 1981.

companies.description_zh: 伯克希尔的钢铁加工子公司
companies.key_quote_zh: 精密钢铁1981年贡献84.1万美元。

companies.description_zh: 美国著名安保公司，伯克希尔曾考虑的投资标的
companies.description_en: Famous American security company, an investment target Berkshire considered
companies.key_quote_zh: 我们也期待偶尔会出现像本报告后文平克顿安保案例所讨论的那种大型"无投票权合伙"的机会。
companies.key_quote_en: We expect an occasional offering of a major 'non-voting partnership' as discussed under the Pinkerton's heading.

people.description_zh: 伯克希尔·哈撒韦公司董事长兼CEO，20世纪最成功的投资者之一
people.description_en: Chairman and CEO of Berkshire Hathaway, one of the most successful investors of the 20th century
people.key_quote_zh: 我们的收购决策以最大化真正的经济利益为目标，而非追求管理版图的扩大或会计数字的好看。
people.key_quote_en: Our acquisition decisions will be aimed at maximizing real economic benefits, not at maximizing either managerial domain or reported numbers for accounting purposes.

people.description_zh: 伯克希尔副董事长，蓝筹印花董事长，巴菲特的长期合作伙伴
people.description_en: Vice Chairman of Berkshire and Chairman of Blue Chip Stamps, Buffett's long-term partner
people.key_quote_zh: 这个指定捐赠的主意，连同许多其他后来证明对我们很有益的主意一样，都是查理·芒格——伯克希尔副董事长兼蓝筹印花董事长——想出来的。
people.key_quote_en: The designated-contributions idea, along with many other ideas that have turned out well for us, was conceived by Charlie Munger, Vice Chairman of Berkshire and Chairman of Blue Chip Stamps.

people.description_zh: 国民保险公司管理者，保险承保团队的杰出领袖
people.description_en: Manager of National Indemnity Company, outstanding leader of the insurance underwriting team
people.key_quote_zh: 我们的管理者们，尤其是菲尔·利舍、比尔·莱恩斯、罗兰·米勒、弗洛伊德·泰勒和米尔特·桑顿，在逆流中游得非常出色。
people.key_quote_en: Our managers, particularly Phil Liesche, Bill Lyons, Roland Miller, Floyd Taylor and Milt Thornton, have done a magnificent job of swimming against the tide.

people.description_zh: 国民保险公司管理者之一
people.description_en: One of the managers at National Indemnity Company
people.key_quote_zh: 罗兰·米勒在承保部门的同事，协助菲尔·利舍管理保险业务。
people.key_quote_en: Colleague of Phil Liesche in the insurance operations.

people.description_zh: 西北工业公司董事长兼CEO，被巴菲特称赞的经营奇才
people.description_en: Chairman and CEO of Northwest Industries, a managerial superstar praised by Buffett
people.key_quote_zh: 我们向这些管理者致敬，包括西北工业公司的本·海涅曼。
people.key_quote_en: We salute such managers as Ben Heineman at Northwest Industries.

people.description_zh: 特利丹公司CEO，被巴菲特称赞的经营奇才
people.description_en: CEO of Teledyne, a managerial superstar praised by Buffett
people.key_quote_zh: 特利丹公司的亨利·辛格尔顿是经营奇才的代表人物之一。
people.key_quote_en: Henry Singleton at Teledyne was one of the managerial superstars.

people.description_zh: 国民服务工业公司CEO，被巴菲特称赞的经营奇才
people.description_en: CEO of National Service Industries, a managerial superstar praised by Buffett
people.key_quote_zh: 国民服务工业公司的埃尔文·扎班是值得致敬的管理奇才。
people.key_quote_en: Erwin Zaban at National Service Industries was another managerial superstar.

people.description_zh: 大都会通讯公司CEO，被巴菲特称为"双料冠军"，兼具优秀收购眼光和卓越经营能力
people.description_en: CEO of Capital Cities Communications, called a 'real managerial twofer' by Buffett for his dual excellence in acquisitions and operations
people.key_quote_zh: 尤其是大都会通讯公司的汤姆·墨菲——他堪称双料冠军，收购标的精准锁定在第一类公司，而自身的经营才华又使他成为第二类的领军人物。
people.key_quote_en: Especially Tom Murphy at Capital Cities Communications (a real managerial 'twofer', whose acquisition efforts have been properly focused in Category 1 and whose operating talents also make him a leader of Category 2).

concepts.description_zh: 伯克希尔在不控制的公司中的持股应享有的未分配收益，这些收益虽未计入报表但终将转化为股东价值
concepts.description_en: Berkshire's proportional share of undistributed earnings in companies it does not control, which though not on the books will eventually translate into shareholder value
concepts.key_quote_zh: 这些未分配且未被记录的收益，终将转化为伯克希尔股东实实在在的有形价值，其确定性丝毫不亚于那些我们完全控制的子公司所赚取、保留并报告的同等收益。
concepts.key_quote_en: Those undistributed and, therefore, unrecorded earnings will be translated into tangible value for Berkshire shareholders just as surely as if subsidiaries we control had earned, retained - and reported - similar earnings.

concepts.description_zh: 衡量公司运用股权资本获利能力的财务指标，巴菲特用其作为评估管理层表现的关键指标
concepts.description_en: Financial metric measuring a company's ability to generate profits from shareholders' equity, used by Buffett as a key measure of managerial performance
concepts.key_quote_zh: 美国企业的股本回报率仅为14%左右。而这14%在到达个人投资者手中之前还要被大幅缩水。
concepts.key_quote_en: American business is producing earnings of only about 14% on equity. And this 14% will be substantially reduced by taxation before it can be banked by the individual owner.

concepts.description_zh: 企业基于其未来现金流生成能力所具有的真实价值，与市场价格的短期波动无关
concepts.description_en: The true value of a business based on its ability to generate cash flows in the future, independent of short-term market price fluctuations
concepts.key_quote_zh: 如果导致长期通胀的根源能得到控制，被动投资回报率很可能下降，美国股权资本的内在价值将显著改善。
concepts.key_quote_en: If the causes of long-term inflation can be tempered, passive returns are likely to fall and the intrinsic position of American equity capital should significantly improve.

concepts.description_zh: 法院和陪审团倾向于扩大保险覆盖范围的趋势，导致保险公司赔付超出预期
concepts.description_en: The tendency of courts and juries to expand insurance coverage beyond what insurers expected, causing losses beyond projections
concepts.key_quote_zh: 货币通胀和"社会通胀"——法院和陪审团倾向于将保险覆盖范围扩展到超出保险公司依据合同条款和判例所预期的程度——这双重通胀是无法遏制的。
concepts.key_quote_en: The twin inflations, monetary and 'social' (the tendency of courts and juries to stretch the coverage of policies beyond what insurers, relying upon contract terminology and precedent, had expected), are unstoppable.

concepts.description_zh: 保险行业衡量承保盈利能力的指标，综合比率低于100表示承保盈利，高于100表示承保亏损
concepts.description_en: Insurance industry metric for underwriting profitability; below 100 indicates underwriting profit, above 100 indicates underwriting loss
concepts.key_quote_zh: 综合比率表示总运营和损失成本与保费的比率；低于100表示承保盈利，高于100表示承保亏损。1981年的综合比率达到105.7。
concepts.key_quote_en: The combined ratio indicates total operating and loss costs as compared to premiums; a ratio below 100 indicates an underwriting profit, and one above 100 indicates a loss. The 1981 combined ratio reached 105.7.

concepts.description_zh: 公司净利润中未作为股利分配、而是留存再投资的部分
concepts.description_en: Net profits retained by a company rather than distributed as dividends, reinvested in the business
concepts.key_quote_zh: 各公司留存收益获得市场认可的程度也参差不齐：当收益被非生产性地使用时，市场给出的回报将令人失望地低，甚至为负。
concepts.key_quote_en: Market recognition of retained earnings also will be unevenly realized among companies. It will be disappointingly low or negative in cases where earnings are employed non-productively.

concepts.description_zh: 保险公司在承保时坚持只接受盈利业务的纪律，即使这意味着失去市场份额
concepts.description_en: Insurance company discipline to only accept profitable business in underwriting, even if it means losing market share
concepts.key_quote_zh: 眼睁睁看着别人以愚蠢的价格抢走生意，实在有悖于一般机构的本能行为。这需要非同寻常的承保纪律。
concepts.key_quote_en: It runs counter to normal institutional behavior to let the other fellow take away business - even at foolish prices. Unusual managerial discipline will be required.
